ui-ux-pro-max.input: Industry keywords string, optional domain filter, optional project name
ui-ux-pro-max.output: Design system: color palette, typography, spacing, shadows, border-radius, visual style (50+ styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings). Supports 10 stacks: React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, HTML/CSS
ui-ux-pro-max.notes: Use --design-system flag to get full design system. Use --domain landing for landing page patterns. Call scripts/design_system.py for full token output. Requires Python 3.

page-cro.invocation: Read SKILL.md and apply CRO framework to scraped page content. No CLI — LLM-native skill.
page-cro.input: Page content (HTML/markdown), page type (homepage/landing/pricing), conversion goal, traffic source
page-cro.output: Analysis across 7 dimensions (value prop, headline, CTA, visual hierarchy, trust signals, objection handling, friction points). Each dimension: score 1-5 + problem + solution. Quick wins + high-impact changes + test ideas + copy alternatives.
page-cro.notes: Check for .agents/product-marketing-context.md first. Related: signup-flow-cro, form-cro, popup-cro, copywriting, ab-test-setup

seo-audit.invocation: Read SKILL.md and apply SEO audit framework to page HTML/metadata. No CLI — LLM-native skill.
seo-audit.input: Page URL, HTML content, metadata. Optionally: Search Console data, current traffic, recent changes
seo-audit.output: Technical SEO findings (crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, mobile, HTTPS, URL structure) + On-page findings (title tags, meta descriptions, heading structure, content, images, internal links, keywords). Priority-ordered action plan with High/Medium/Low impact per issue.
seo-audit.notes: web_fetch cannot detect JS-injected schema (use Rich Results Test for schema validation). Priority order: crawlability > technical > on-page > content > authority

copywriting.invocation: Read SKILL.md and apply copywriting framework to existing page text. No CLI — LLM-native skill.
copywriting.input: Page type, target audience, product/offer description, traffic source, existing copy
copywriting.output: Rewritten copy organized by section: headline + subheadline + CTA (above fold), social proof, problem/pain, solution/benefits, how it works, objection handling, final CTA. Includes 2-3 alternatives for headlines and CTAs with rationale. Meta title + meta description.
copywriting.notes: Principles: clarity > cleverness, benefits > features, specific > vague, customer language > company jargon. Use copy-editing skill after draft for polish.

animate.invocation: Read SKILL.md and generate animation strategy for UI. Invokes /frontend-design as dependency. LLM-native skill.
animate.input: UI components/sections to animate, brand personality (playful/serious), performance budget, audience context
animate.output: Animation plan with 4 layers: (1) Hero moment — ONE signature animation, (2) Feedback layer — interactions needing acknowledgment, (3) Transition layer — state changes to smooth, (4) Delight layer — surprise moments. CSS/JS implementation specs with timing (100-800ms ranges) and easing curves.
animate.notes: CRITICAL: Always include prefers-reduced-motion. Avoid bounce/elastic easing. Only animate transform + opacity (GPU-accelerated). Exit animations = ~75% of enter duration. NEVER animate layout properties (width/height/top/left).
